title: JOB CONNECTIONS - 211info
text: GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES JOB CONNECTIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides vocational services to individuals with barriers to employment. Offers career counseling, job leads and referral, resume and application assistance, interview preparation, connection to community resources, access to computer, printer, and phones and more. Also administers SNAP Training and Employment Partnership (STEP) which provides supervised job search, job search training and support, vocational training, and support services to individuals receiving SNAP that are eligible STEP. 1010 Green Acres Road Eugene, OR 97408 Eligibility: Job Connections: Tuesday 1pm-4pm and Wednesday 9am-noon Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 345-1801 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 345-1801 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information. Visit website for Job Connection sites and contact information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Lane Counties Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. GOODWILL INDUSTRIES OF LANE AND SOUTH COAST COUNTIES
